title: HOW TO AVOID A 'JOKER SMILE' WHEN TREATING A DOWNTURNED MOUTH.
filename: HOW TO AVOID A _JOKER SMILE_ WHEN TREATING A DOWNTURNED MOUTH..en.vtt
excerpt: Don't give your patients a joker smile when trying to correct a downturn mouth. This type of result can look bizarre, which we'll get to later in this video. But many of you will be thinking, "But I can't even lift a downturn mouth.
